frames.name: Military Operations Focus
frames.description: Presents the conflict primarily through the lens of military strategy, casualties, and operational updates
frames.emphasis: U.S. service member deaths, military objectives achieved, operational scope and timeline

frames.name: Humanitarian Crisis Frame
frames.description: Centers civilian casualties and humanitarian impact as the primary concern
frames.emphasis: Civilian death tolls, attacks on schools and hospitals, humanitarian consequences

frames.name: Political Consequences Frame
frames.description: Focuses on domestic political implications and public opinion regarding the conflict
frames.emphasis: Trump's approval ratings, polling on Iran strikes, political costs of casualties

outlierPerspectives: Detailed documentation of specific civilian casualty incidents (Vox's focus on the Minab elementary school strike killing 175 people)
Polling data showing only 25% American support for Iran strikes (Foreign Policy)
Analysis of friendly fire incidents and operational chaos (Axios reporting on Kuwaiti forces shooting down U.S. jets)
missingContext: What triggered this military operation - the precipitating events or justification
International diplomatic response and efforts at de-escalation
Economic implications and oil market impacts
Regional allies' positions beyond Kuwait's involvement
Congressional authorization or legal framework for the operation
Comparison to previous U.S.-Iran military confrontations
Iran's military capabilities and strategic response options
